name: ratified decisions (ADR index)
description: @resonance/core is the root of the dep graph — shared types, Zod schemas, ports; keep logic extraction-ready (ADR-0002, ADR-0003).

content: Define the generated-draft + commit Zod schemas (CreatorProfileDraft, CommitProfileInput) in @resonance/core; @resonance/ai (server) produces, @resonance/ui (client) edits, apps/web validates — same rationale as InterviewMessageSchema. Factor field-limit schemas as module-private consts shared by draft + commit so limits can't drift.
